subcodes.title: Words to Alma Knobloch, spoken on 1908-11-07
subcodes.first_line: A good foundation is laid in Germany. The believers must be firmly grounded n the principles of morality and honesty. First--Truthfulness…
subcodes.subjects: @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @exhortations and counsels, @being a source of light; guidance, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @compassion; kindness, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @spiritual transformation
